name: Pork Schnitzel
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound pork to 1/4 to 1/8 inch thickness.
2. Cut small slits around the edges to prevent curling.
3. Coat meat with a mixture of flour, salt, and pepper.
4. Combine egg and milk; dip meat into the egg mixture, then in a mixture of bread crumbs and paprika.
5. In a large skillet, cook meat in shortening for 2 to 3 minutes on each side. Remove from pan and keep warm.
6. Pour broth into the skillet, scraping to loosen crusty drippings.
7. Blend flour and dill weed into sour cream. Stir mixture into the broth.
8. Cook and stir until the mixture thickens; do not boil. Serve with pork.
